description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the default Docker image and defines a before_script which runs: python -V, which python, curl -O https://bootstrap.pypa.io/get-pip.py, python get-pip.py, pip --version, and pip install --upgrade tornado flake8. Add an echo job that is limited to automatically triggered pipelines (only: auto). In the echo job's script execute python -c 'print("Hello, world")'.
